zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 126 of file zsh.c.

126                                                          {
127   if (!output) {
128     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
129   }
130 
131   /* Load discovery options early so we can use them for binary-level completion.
132    * Binary-level completion (options before mode name like --color-mode) uses
133    * _arguments with -n -S flags to establish proper zsh completion context.
134    * Without _arguments, completion functions fail with "can only be called from
135    * completion function" error, causing zsh to display "corrections (errors: N)"
136    * messages. The -n flag disables defaults and -S disables short option
137    * processing, allowing safe context establishment. */
138   size_t discovery_count = 0;
139   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, false, &discovery_count);
140 
141   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
142                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
143                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
144                   "\n"
145                   "_ascii_chat_binary() {\n"
146                   "  local -a binary_opts=(\n");
147 
148   /* Add discovery options to binary-level completion */
149   if (discovery_opts) {
150     for (size_t i = 0; i < discovery_count; i++) {
151       fprintf(output, "    '--%s:", discovery_opts[i].long_name);
152       zsh_escape_desc(output, discovery_opts[i].help_text);
153       fprintf(output, "'\n");
154     }
155   }
156 
157   fprintf(output, "  )\n"
158                   "  local -a descriptions\n"
159                   "  for opt in \"${binary_opts[@]}\"; do\n"
160                   "    descriptions+=(\"${opt%%:*}\")\n"
161                   "  done\n"
162                   "  compadd \"$@\" -- \"${descriptions[@]}\"\n"
163                   "}\n"
164                   "\n"
165                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
166                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line\n"
167                   "  if [[ ${words[2]} == -* ]]; then\n"
168                   "    # Binary-level options: show discovery mode options\n"
169                   "    if _arguments -n -S : '1: :->binary'; then\n"
170                   "      [[ $state == binary ]] && _ascii_chat_binary\n"
171                   "    fi\n"
172                   "    return\n"
173                   "  else\n"
174                   "    # Mode selection or mode options\n"
175                   "    _arguments \\\n"
176                   "      '1:mode:->mode' \\\n"
177                   "      '*::args:_ascii_chat_args'\n"
178                   "    case $state in\n"
179                   "      mode)\n"
180                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
181                   "      server_modes=(\n");
182 
183   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
184   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
185   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
186   if (mode_server_descs) {
187     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
188       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
189     }
190     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
191   }
192 
193   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
194                   "      client_modes=(\n");
195 
196   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
197   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
198   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
199   if (mode_client_descs) {
200     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
201       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
202       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
203         continue;
204       }
205       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
206     }
207     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
208   }
209 
210   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
211                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
212                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
213                   "      ;;\n"
214                   "    esac\n"
215                   "  fi\n"
216                   "}\n"
217                   "\n"
218                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
219                   "  case $words[1] in\n"
220                   "    # Server-like modes\n"
221                   "    server)\n"
222                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
223                   "      ;;\n"
224                   "    discovery-service)\n"
225                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
226                   "      ;;\n"
227                   "\n"
228                   "    # Client-like modes\n"
229                   "    client)\n"
230                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
231                   "      ;;\n"
232                   "    mirror)\n"
233                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
234                   "      ;;\n"
235                   "\n"
236                   "    *)\n"
237                   "      # Default mode (discovery)\n"
238                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
239                   "      ;;\n"
240                   "  esac\n"
241                   "}\n"
242                   "\n"
243                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
244                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
245 
246   /* Server options - grouped by category */
247   size_t server_count = 0;
248   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
249 
250   if (server_opts) {
251     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
252     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
253   }
254 
255   fprintf(output, "}\n"
256                   "\n"
257                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
258 
259   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
260   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
261   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
262       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
263 
264   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
265     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
266     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
267   }
268 
269   fprintf(output, "}\n"
270                   "\n"
271                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
272                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
273 
274   /* Client options - grouped by category */
275   size_t client_count = 0;
276   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
277 
278   if (client_opts) {
279     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
280     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
281   }
282 
283   fprintf(output, "}\n"
284                   "\n"
285                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
286 
287   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
288   size_t mirror_count = 0;
289   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
290 
291   if (mirror_opts) {
292     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
293     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
294   }
295 
296   fprintf(output, "}\n"
297                   "\n"
298                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
299                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
300 
301   /* Discovery options - grouped by category (reuse already-loaded options) */
302   if (discovery_opts) {
303     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
304   }
305 
306   fprintf(output, "}\n"
307                   "\n"
308                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
309 
310   SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
311 
312   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
313 }




References get_modes_by_group(),
    options_registry_get_for_display(), SAFE_FREE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().

    ascii-chat
